title: Better exploration with parameter noise
titleZh: 利用参数噪声进行更好的探索
summary: We’ve found that adding adaptive noise to the parameters of reinforcement learning algorithms frequently boosts performance. This exploration method is simple to implement and very rarely decreases performance, so it’s worth trying on any problem.
summaryZh: 我们发现，在强化学习算法的参数中添加自适应噪声通常会提高性能。这种探索方法易于实现，很少降低性能，因此值得对任何问题进行尝试。
highlights: We’ve found that adding adaptive noise to the parameters of reinforcement learning algorithms frequently boosts performance.
This exploration method is simple to implement and very rarely decreases performance, so it’s worth trying on any problem.
highlightsZh: 我们发现，在强化学习算法的参数中添加自适应噪声通常会提高性能。这种探索方法易于实现，很少降低性能，因此值得对任何问题进行尝试。

title: Proximal Policy Optimization
summary: We’re releasing a new class of reinforcement learning algorithms, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), which perform comparably or better than state-of-the-art approaches while being much simpler to implement and tune. title: Robust adversarial inputs
summary: We’ve created images that reliably fool neural network classifiers when viewed from varied scales and perspectives. This challenges a claim from last week that self-driving cars would be hard to trick maliciously since they capture images from multiple scales, angles, perspectives, and the like.
summaryZh: 从不同的尺度和角度看，我们创建的图像可以可靠地欺骗神经网络分类器。这挑战了上周的一种说法，即自动驾驶汽车很难被恶意欺骗，因为它们从多个尺度、角度、视角等捕获图像。
highlights: We’ve created images that reliably fool neural network classifiers when viewed from varied scales and perspectives.
This challenges a claim from last week that self-driving cars would be hard to trick maliciously since they capture images from multiple scales, angles, perspectives, and the like.
